abilities.description:
When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.d9208f9b7d827aec]{React Under Attack} by holding a foe at bay using your spear’s reach, roll +iron or +edge. If you score a hit, you may…

  • Iron: @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ae5994ceb3cba098]{Strike} if in control or @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.723192c97fec4fe2]{Clash} now, and add +1.
  • Edge: Take +1 momentum.

When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ae5994ceb3cba098]{Strike} in close combat, you may attempt to drive your spear home (decide before rolling). If you do, add +1 and mark progress twice on a hit. If you score a hit and the fight continues, @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.d9208f9b7d827aec]{React Under Attack} or @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.3f5a834fa3fea5d1]{Gain Ground} +iron to recover your spear.
When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.3f5a834fa3fea5d1]{Gain Ground} by bracing your spear against a charging foe, add +1 and take +1 momentum on a hit.
